ddls:
CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job */,
  "work_year" INTEGER /* Year the job was posted */,
  "experience_level" INTEGER /* Level of experience required for the job (e.g., MI, SE) */,
  "employment_type" INTEGER /* Type of employment (e.g., FT, PT) */,
  "job_title" INTEGER /* Title of the job */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary for the job in the specified currency */,
  "salary_currency" INTEGER /* Currency of the salary (e.g., EUR, USD) */,
  "salary_in_usd" REAL /* Salary in USD */,
  "employee_residence" INTEGER /* Location of the employee (e.g., DE, JP) */,
  "remote_ratio" INTEGER /* Ratio of remote work (e.g., 0, 50) */,
  "company_location" INTEGER /* Location of the company (e.g., DE, JP) */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company (e.g., L, S, M) */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the job belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the job belongs to */,
  "posted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the job */,
  "job_status" TEXT /* Status of the job posting (e.g., open, closed, draft) */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for job applications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_employment_type FOREIGN KEY ("employment_type") REFERENCES employment_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_employee_residence FOREIGN KEY ("employee_residence") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_experience_level FOREIGN KEY ("experience_level") REFERENCES experience_levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_posted_by FOREIGN KEY ("posted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_company_location FOREIGN KEY ("company_location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_salary_currency FOREIGN KEY ("salary_currency") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_job_title FOREIGN KEY ("job_title") REFERENCES job_titles ("title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES job_industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES job_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experience_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experience level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the experience level (e.g., MI, SE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the employment type (e.g., FT, PT) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "title_name" TEXT /* Name of the job title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency (e.g., EUR, USD) */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate to USD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., DE, JP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location of the company */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the company (e.g., L, S, M) */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the company belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the company belongs to */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's website */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES job_industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES job_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_postings" (
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job being posted */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company posting the job */,
  "posting_date" TEXT /* Date the job was posted */,
  "posted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the job */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the job posting (e.g., open, closed, draft) */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for job applications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("posting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_posted_by FOREIGN KEY ("posted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, job seeker) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the job posting */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the job posting was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, apply) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_posting_id FOREIGN KEY ("posting_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("posting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting being applied to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user applying */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., pending, rejected, accepted) */,
  "applied_from" TEXT /* Source from which the application was submitted (e.g., website, job board) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_posting_id FOREIGN KEY ("posting_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("posting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application status */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., pending, rejected, accepted) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_status_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job being paid */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary amount */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency */,
  "salary_in_usd" REAL /* Salary in USD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_ranges" (
  "range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary range */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job being paid */,
  "min_salary" REAL /* Minimum salary */,
  "max_salary" REAL /* Maximum salary */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_ranges_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_ranges_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job being required */,
  "requirement_name" TEXT /* Name of the requirement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job offering the benefit */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id")
)
